title: Challenge Outcome Contract
description: Output contract for challenge resolution — defines the result structure returned after resolving a challenge attempt.

challenge_type.description: The type of challenge that was attempted.

success.description: Whether the challenge was overcome (true for success/partial_success, false for failure/critical_failure).

result_code.description: Outcome classification: success (roll >= DC), partial_success (roll = DC-2 to DC-1), failure (roll < DC-2), critical_failure (d20 roll = 1).

margin.description: Difference between total roll and DC (positive = above DC, negative = below DC).

damage_amount.description: Damage dealt on failure (e.g., fall damage, trap damage).

time_cost_minutes.description: Time spent on failed or partial attempts.

party_location.description: New party location after challenge (if changed).

pc_hp_changes.description: Map of PC ID to HP change amount.

obstacle_cleared.description: Whether the obstacle is now cleared.

state_mutations.description: State changes to apply after challenge resolution.
